title: Mobility Modifications
description: Adds more than just running and jumping! (Dashing, Wall jumping, Climbing, Crawling)
body:
# Adds more than just running and jumping!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6edAnP9n/images/8f85aafc5ffe166b2f29c08eb384cbfd12ea2f54.png)

# Dashing:
- Uses up hunger bars
- Launches you through the air
- Speed depends on amount of hunger bars
- Can't be used without hunger bars
# Wall Jumping:
- Uses up hunger bars
- Allows you to jump high on walls
- Wall jump higher with the **Jump Boost** effect
- Yes, you can avoid fall damage with this
# Climbing:
- Uses up more hunger bars than wall jumping or dashing
- Allows you to climb on walls
- Speed depends on amount of hunger
- Doesn't move you up on no hunger bars
- Yes, you can also avoid fall damage with this
# Crawling:
- Doesn't use up hunger bars
- Lets you crawl with a single keybind
- Crawl everywhere!
